creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Kenji,

    Thanks for the suggestion.
    
    Applying the patch at `/usr/ports/dns/ldns` directory modified the
    `Makefile` and
    created `patch-configure` in the same directory level.

So the patch as created by the "ports submit" didn't create the
/usr/ports/dns/ldns.files directory. I didn't realized that.

I should probably have mentioned that the files directory needed
to be added.

    I move the `patch-configure` file into `files` directory by adding the
    following operation:
    
        mkdir files
        mv patch-configure files

Yes! That is what was intended.
    
    By moving the `patch-configure` file the dns/py-ldns was successfully built.

I'm glad to see that.

Regards,

	jaap
